title: Whisper's TBS Modpack
description: A pack of mods I always add ontop of The Broken Script. They are mostly ambience mods with a few quality of life mods mixed in
body:
## This is a pack of mods I use/have used when playing The Broken Script

It includes;
- a VHS shader for those who don't enjoy the 4:3 ratio but still want the filter.
- Tense Ambience (unsure how well it works in 1.21.1)
- Biome Ambience (surprisingly makes it feel even more isolated)
- Sound Physics.
- World Map & Mini Map.
- And a few quality of life things in there too.
  
_This modpack may take away from the original intended feel of the mod_, or it may enhance it. It's effect on the mod is completely up for you to decide. Some Mods included are Fabric only, hence the connectors and extra dependencies (also may be the reason 'Tense Ambience' doesn't work on occasion) _~~if you don't like how it makes the mod feel, there is no obligation for you to continue using the Modpack~~_
